channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Meta is reportedly 'reassigning' 7,000 employees to AI-focused roles
item.description: The company is transferring workers to four new organizations building AI tools and apps, according to NYT and Reuters.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for May 19, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for May 19, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for May 19, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1795 on May 19 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
